protocols.Paper_title: Isolation and Characterization of φkm18p, a Novel Lytic Phage with Therapeutic Potential against Extensively Drug Resistant Acinetobacter baumannii
protocols.Evidence: phage enrichment technique; bacterial cells were centrifuged and the supernatant was filtered

protocols.Paper_title: Isolation and Characterization of φkm18p, a Novel Lytic Phage with Therapeutic Potential against Extensively Drug Resistant Acinetobacter baumannii
protocols.Evidence: phage lysate was centrifuged, filtered, treated with nucleases, and banded particles were collected and dialyzed

protocols.Paper_title: Isolation and Characterization of φkm18p, a Novel Lytic Phage with Therapeutic Potential against Extensively Drug Resistant Acinetobacter baumannii
protocols.Evidence: phage-infected culture sample was centrifuged; the pellet was washed with PBS

protocols.Paper_title: Isolation and Characterization of φkm18p, a Novel Lytic Phage with Therapeutic Potential against Extensively Drug Resistant Acinetobacter baumannii
protocols.Evidence: Phage DNA was extracted from purified phage particles following the Viral Nucleic Extraction Kit II procedure

protocols.Paper_title: Isolation and Characterization of φkm18p, a Novel Lytic Phage with Therapeutic Potential against Extensively Drug Resistant Acinetobacter baumannii
protocols.Evidence: solid block was lysed with proteinase K in cell lysis buffer containing Sarcosine; agarose block was washed

protocols.Paper_title: Isolation and Characterization of φkm18p, a Novel Lytic Phage with Therapeutic Potential against Extensively Drug Resistant Acinetobacter baumannii
protocols.Evidence: phage suspension was spotted onto a mesh grid, stained, and examined under an electron microscope

protocols.Paper_title: Isolation and Characterization of φkm18p, a Novel Lytic Phage with Therapeutic Potential against Extensively Drug Resistant Acinetobacter baumannii
protocols.Evidence: phage lysate was centrifuged and filtered; proteins were dialyzed and run on SDS-PAGE without boiling

protocols.Paper_title: Isolation and Characterization of φkm18p, a Novel Lytic Phage with Therapeutic Potential against Extensively Drug Resistant Acinetobacter baumannii
protocols.Evidence: wells were washed twice with PBS and incubated with trypsin-EDTA solution
